source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E14 Flying a Kite［放風箏］(Canto spoken subs)

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E14 Flying a Kite［放風箏］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: ngo5 giu3 zou6
cards.english: My name is Peppa

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E14 Flying a Kite［放風箏］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: ji4 keoi5 zau6 hai6 ngo5 sai3 lou2
cards.english: And this is my little brother George

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E14 Flying a Kite［放風箏］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: keoi5 zau6 hai6 zyu1 taai3 taai2
cards.english: And this is Mummy Pig

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E14 Flying a Kite［放風箏］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: keoi5 hai6 zyu1 sin1 saang1
cards.english: He's Daddy Pig.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E14 Flying a Kite［放風箏］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: ngo5 hai6
cards.english: I'm Peppa.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E14 Flying a Kite［放風箏］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: fong3 fung1 zang1
cards.english: [Flying a Kite]

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E14 Flying a Kite［放風箏］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: gam1 jat6 joeng4 gwong1 pou2 ziu3
cards.english: It's a bright sunny day today.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E14 Flying a Kite［放風箏］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: tung4 keoi5 uk1 kei5 jan4 lai4 dou3 gung1 jyun2
cards.english: Peppa and her family have come to the park.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E14 Flying a Kite［放風箏］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: keoi5 dei6 zeon2 bei6 fong3 fung1 zang1
cards.english: They're getting ready to fly a kite.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E14 Flying a Kite［放風箏］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: zeon2 bei6 dai6 jat1 go3 fong3 fung1 zang1
cards.english: George is getting ready to fly the kite first.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E14 Flying a Kite［放風箏］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: ceot1 zeon2 cyun4 lik6 gam2 paau2
cards.english: George runs as fast as he possibly can.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E14 Flying a Kite［放風箏］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 但係隻風箏始終飛唔起
cards.jyutping: daan6 hai6 zek3 fung1 zang1 ci2 zung1 fei1 m4 hei2
cards.english: But the kite still won't get off the ground.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E14 Flying a Kite［放風箏］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: nei5 jyun4 cyun4 zou6 co3 saai3 aa3
cards.english: George, you're doing it completely wrong!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E14 Flying a Kite［放風箏］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: nei5 gan1 bun2 paau2 dak1 m4 gau3 faai3
cards.english: You're just not running fast enough.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E14 Flying a Kite［放風箏］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: ji4 gaa1 leon6 dou3 ngo5 laa3
cards.english: Now it's my turn.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E14 Flying a Kite［放風箏］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: zeon6 saai3 cyun4 lik6 gam2 paau2
cards.english: Peppa runs as fast as she can.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E14 Flying a Kite［放風箏］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 但係隻風箏仍然飛唔起
cards.jyutping: daan6 hai6 zek3 fung1 zang1 jing4 jin4 fei1 m4 hei2
cards.english: But the kite still won't take off.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E14 Flying a Kite［放風箏］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 而家冇風，隻風箏係飛唔起㗎
cards.jyutping: ji4 gaa1 mou5 fung1 zek3 fung1 zang1 hai6 fei1 m4 hei2 gaa4
cards.english: There's no wind right now, so the kite just can't fly.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E14 Flying a Kite［放風箏］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: nei5 paau2 dak1 gei2 faai3 dou1 mou5 jung6
cards.english: No matter how fast you run, it's no use.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E14 Flying a Kite［放風箏］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 我哋要慢慢等，等到有風吹為止啊
cards.jyutping: ngo5 dei6 jiu3 maan6 maan2 dang2 dang2 dou3 jau5 fung1 ceoi1 wai4 zi2 aa3
cards.english: We'll just have to wait patiently until the wind picks up.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E14 Flying a Kite［放風箏］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: tai2 haa6 hoi1 ci2 jau5 fung1 laa3
cards.english: Look, the wind's starting to blow.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E14 Flying a Kite［放風箏］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 而家開始有風，風箏飛得起喇
cards.jyutping: ji4 gaa1 hoi1 ci2 jau5 fung1 fung1 zang1 fei1 dak1 hei2 laa3
cards.english: Now that there's some wind, the kite can fly.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E14 Flying a Kite［放風箏］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: di1 fung1 jyut6 lai4 jyut6 daai6
cards.english: The wind is getting stronger and stronger.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E14 Flying a Kite［放風箏］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: ji4 gaa1 di1 fung1 fei1 soeng4 daai6
cards.english: Now the wind is really strong.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E14 Flying a Kite［放風箏］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: m4 goi1 nei5 aa3 de1 dei6
cards.english: Thank you, Daddy.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E14 Flying a Kite［放風箏］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: zyu1 sin1 saang1 fong3 fung1 zang1
cards.english: Daddy Pig flies the kite.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E14 Flying a Kite［放風箏］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: hou2 je5
cards.english: Hooray!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E14 Flying a Kite［放風箏］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: gou1 di1
cards.english: Higher...!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E14 Flying a Kite［放風箏］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 豬先生好識得控制隻風箏
cards.jyutping: zyu1 sin1 saang1 hou2 sik1 dak1 hung3 zai3 zek3 fung1 zang1
cards.english: Daddy Pig really knows how to control the kite.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E14 Flying a Kite［放風箏］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 係啊，我喺呢方面都算係專家嚟㗎
cards.jyutping: hai6 aa3 ngo5 hai2 ne1 fong1 min6 dou1 syun3 hai6 zyun1 gaa1 lai4 gaa4
cards.english: That's right, I'm something of an expert at this.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E14 Flying a Kite［放風箏］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: nei5 jiu3 siu2 sam1 di1 syu6 aa3
cards.english: Watch out for the trees.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E14 Flying a Kite［放風箏］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: m4 hai6 zek3 fung1 zang1 wui6 kaa1 zyu6 gaa4
cards.english: No, the kite will get stuck.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E14 Flying a Kite［放風箏］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: fong3 sam1 laa1 ngo5 zi1 ngo5 zou6 gan2 me1
cards.english: Don't worry, I know what I'm doing.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E14 Flying a Kite［放風箏］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: juk1 bai6 laa3
cards.english: Oh, no.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E14 Flying a Kite［放風箏］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 豬先生令風箏卡住喺樖樹上邊啊
cards.jyutping: zyu1 sin1 saang1 ling6 fung1 zang1 kaa1 zyu6 hai2 po1 syu6 soeng6 bin6 aa3
cards.english: Daddy Pig got the kite stuck up in the tree.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E14 Flying a Kite［放風箏］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: bai6 laa3
cards.english: Oh no.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E14 Flying a Kite［放風箏］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: fong3 sam1 laa1
cards.english: Don't worry, George.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E14 Flying a Kite［放風箏］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 爹哋會拎返隻風箏落嚟㗎
cards.jyutping: de1 dei6 wui6 ling1 faan1 zek3 fung1 zang1 lok6 lai4 gaa4
cards.english: Daddy will get the kite back down.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E14 Flying a Kite［放風箏］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: hou2 je5
cards.english: Hooray!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E14 Flying a Kite［放風箏］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 小心啊！嗰度有個大泥氹啊
cards.jyutping: siu2 sam1 aa3 go2 dou6 jau5 go3 daai6 nai4 tam5 aa3
cards.english: Be careful! There's a big muddy puddle over there.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E14 Flying a Kite［放風箏］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: tung4 hou2 zung1 ji3 tiu3 lok6 nai4 tam5 gaa4
cards.english: Peppa and George love jumping in muddy puddles.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E14 Flying a Kite［放風箏］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: ngo5 dei6 ho2 ji5 tiu3 lok6 nai4 tam5 maa1
cards.english: Can we jump in the muddy puddle?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E14 Flying a Kite［放風箏］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: hou2 lo1
cards.english: Sure.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E14 Flying a Kite［放風箏］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 唔得啊，我唔想你哋成身泥啊
cards.jyutping: m4 dak1 aa3 ngo5 m4 soeng2 nei5 dei6 sing4 san1 nai4 aa3
cards.english: No way, I don't want you two getting all covered in mud.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E14 Flying a Kite［放風箏］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: siu2 pang4 jau5 tan3 hau6 di1 aa2
cards.english: Stand back a bit, kids.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E14 Flying a Kite［放風箏］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: nei5 jiu3 siu2 sam1 di1 aa3 de1 dei6
cards.english: You need to be careful, Daddy.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E14 Flying a Kite［放風箏］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: ngo5 zi1 dou3 ngo5 zou6 gan2 me1 ge2
cards.english: I know what I'm doing.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E14 Flying a Kite［放風箏］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: nei5 zan1 hai6 jiu3 siu2 sam1 di1 aa3
cards.english: You really do need to be careful.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E14 Flying a Kite［放風箏］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: zung6 zang1 siu2 siu2 zaa3 de1 dei6
cards.english: Just a little bit more, Daddy.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E14 Flying a Kite［放風箏］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 爹哋啊，你咁重樹枝會支持唔到㗎
cards.jyutping: de1 dei6 aa3 nei5 gam3 cung5 syu6 zi1 wui6 zi1 ci4 m4 dou3 gaa4
cards.english: Daddy, the branch won't hold you, you're too heavy.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E14 Flying a Kite［放風箏］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 冇可能，我知道我自己有幾重㗎
cards.jyutping: mou5 ho2 nang4 ngo5 zi1 dou3 ngo5 zi6 gei2 jau5 gei2 cung5 gaa4
cards.english: No way, I know exactly how heavy I am.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E14 Flying a Kite［放風箏］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: nik1 dou3
cards.english: Got it!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E14 Flying a Kite［放風箏］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: hou2 je5
cards.english: Hooray!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E14 Flying a Kite［放風箏］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 豬先生成功拎到隻風箏
cards.jyutping: zyu1 sin1 saang1 sing4 gung1 ling1 dou3 zek3 fung1 zang1
cards.english: Mr. Pig managed to get the kite down.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E14 Flying a Kite［放風箏］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 弊喇，佢哋全部成身都係泥啊
cards.jyutping: bai6 laa3 keoi5 dei6 cyun4 bou6 sing4 san1 dou1 hai6 nai4 aa3
cards.english: Oh no, they're all completely covered in mud.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E14 Flying a Kite［放風箏］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: hai6 nai4 lai4 ze1
cards.english: It's only mud.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E14 Flying a Kite［放風箏］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: hou2 coi2 zyu1 sin1 saang1 bing3 mou5 sau6 soeng1
cards.english: Luckily Mr. Pig wasn't hurt.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E14 Flying a Kite［放風箏］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 而且隻風箏亦搦返落嚟
cards.jyutping: ji4 ce2 zek3 fung1 zang1 jik6 nik1 faan1 lok6 lai4
cards.english: And the kite was brought back down too.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E14 Flying a Kite［放風箏］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: hou2 je5 hou2 je5
cards.english: - Hooray! - Hooray!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E14 Flying a Kite［放風箏］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 媽咪，我哋而家都成身泥
cards.jyutping: maa1 mi4 ngo5 dei6 ji4 gaa1 dou1 sing4 san1 nai4
cards.english: Mummy, now we're all covered in mud too.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E14 Flying a Kite［放風箏］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: ngo5 dei6 ho2 ji5 tiu3 lok6 nai4 tam5 maa1
cards.english: Can we jump in the muddy puddle?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E14 Flying a Kite［放風箏］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: gei3 jin4 hai6 gam2 hou2 laa1
cards.english: Well, in that case, alright.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E14 Flying a Kite［放風箏］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 反正你哋已經污糟晒喇
cards.jyutping: faan2 zing3 nei5 dei6 ji5 ging1 wu1 zou1 saai3 laa3
cards.english: You're all filthy anyway.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E14 Flying a Kite［放風箏］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 仲有我諗爹哋要負責幫你哋沖涼啊
cards.jyutping: zung6 jau5 ngo5 nam2 de1 dei6 jiu3 fu6 zaak3 bong1 nei5 dei6 cung1 loeng4 aa3
cards.english: And I think Daddy will be in charge of giving you all a bath.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E14 Flying a Kite［放風箏］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: Peppa同George 好鍾意喺泥氹度跳上跳落
cards.jyutping: tung4 hou2 zung1 ji3 hai2 nai4 tam5 dou6 tiu3 soeng5 tiu3 lok6
cards.english: Peppa and George love jumping up and down in muddy puddles.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E14 Flying a Kite［放風箏］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 豬太太同豬先生 都好鍾意喺泥氹度跳上跳落
cards.jyutping: zyu1 taai3 taai2 tung4 zyu1 sin1 saang1 dou1 hou2 zung1 ji3 hai2 nai4 tam5 dou6 tiu3 soeng5 tiu3 lok6
cards.english: Mrs. Pig and Mr. Pig both love jumping up and down in muddy puddles too.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E14 Flying a Kite［放風箏］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 大家都好鍾意喺泥氹度跳上跳落
cards.jyutping: daai6 gaa1 dou1 hou2 zung1 ji3 hai2 nai4 tam5 dou6 tiu3 soeng5 tiu3 lok6
cards.english: Everyone loves jumping up and down in muddy puddles.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E14 Flying a Kite［放風箏］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 原來喺泥氹度跳上跳落
cards.jyutping: jyun4 loi4 hai2 nai4 tam5 dou6 tiu3 soeng5 tiu3 lok6
cards.english: It turns out that jumping up and down in muddy puddles

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E14 Flying a Kite［放風箏］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 同放風箏一樣咁好玩㗎
cards.jyutping: tung4 fong3 fung1 zang1 jat1 joeng6 gam3 hou2 wun6 gaa4
cards.english: is just as much fun as flying a kite.

defs: to go to one's school or office
to resume an interrupted action (when placed after a verb)
added after a verb to imply that the action is for the better or is with good intentions
particle indicating that a previously asked question is to be applied to the preceding word ("What about ...?", "And ...?")
particle for inquiring about location ("Where is ...?")
particle signaling a pause, to emphasize the preceding words and allow the listener time to take them on board ("ok?", "are you with me?")

(sentence-final particle) used in questions to link back to prior discourse or context ("what about...?", "and...?")
(sentence-final particle) indicating that a state or situation still holds
(discourse particle) used to mark a slight pause or emphasis in speech
dense wool fabric (used for coats and jackets)
by the time when (sth is ready etc)
(noun of sibling) younger brother; slang for penis
